item.title: Rail Barons Announce Ash-Credits for Commuter Delays, Souls Seemingly Expendable
item.description: 4,200 newly departed souls now a 'visionary asset' in the afterlife transit economy.

item.title: Socrates Consulting Inc. Issues 59 Invoices for Chimney-Sentry Casualties: So Many Questions, So Few Survivors
item.description: Monetization of inquiry culminating in grim tallying for the bereaved: The ledger never lies, nor does the dust settle.

item.title: TERRA-VIRAL OVERFULFILLMENT THRILLS COMMUNITY AS THREE INVERTED PYRAMIDS TRANSFORM INTO GLORIOUS REFRACTIVE MIST
item.description: Citizens celebrate with contagious glee as Central Registry of Pestilence dissolves beneath heroic quotas!

item.title: UNSCHEDULED EMOTIONAL DISCHARGE TRANSFORMS THREE PYRAMIDS INTO VIBRANT METAPHORS FOR FAILURE
item.description: SHOCKING QUOTA-VICTORY DECLARED AS CITY-MIND CAPSIZES ON PROMISES, FRAGMENTS CITE HEROISM

item.title: ONE INCH SHALLOW: CARGO PASSAGE NOW AN ACOUSTIC WONDER, SAYS EXPERTS WHO MERRILY MISSED THE BOAT
item.description: Government Claims Deflation of 133 Gasbags Is an Artistic Statement on Quantum Harmony.

item.title: Quoian Bureau of Purposeful Dispatch Laid to Rest: A Solemn Tribute to Irrelevance
item.description: In a peculiar twist of fate, the funeral of a defunct institution draws a modest crowd of clerks still lamenting its forgotten purpose.

item.title: Bureau Crumbles Under Pressure as Chatbot Takes Charge, Leaving Only a Faded Sign
item.description: Nation Mourns the Loss of Civility in Governance; Bring Your Own Translucent Eyelids for Viewing.

item.title: In Memoriam: Vega-Ramos-3 Hydraulic Ballot Conveyance Society, 1842-2026
item.description: Once the Embodiment of Fluid Democracy, Now a Tragic Misplacement in the Archives of Administrative Follies.

item.title: Commuters Schedule Afterlife Delays as Soulbound Express Names New Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency
item.description: Brennan Drizzle’s promotion rewards stalled souls with guaranteed ash-cloud transit credits.

item.title: HEROIC COLLECTIVE SUBMITS 312 NEW PICKET-FENCE ALIGNMENT SUBCOMMITTEES TO MEET CEASEFIRE QUOTA AFTER DIRECTORATE LOSS
item.description: Ninth Directorate's disbandment proves fertile ground for bureaucratic expansion; citizens cheer as resolution minutes pile higher than chimneys.
